riscv:
# CellScript Generated Assembly
# opt_level=0, debug=false
.option arch, +rv64imac

.section .rodata
__type_desc_Token:
    .word 2
    .byte 6
    .ascii "amount"
    .align 3
    .word 4
    .byte 6
    .ascii "symbol"
    .align 3
    .word 9
.section .rodata
__type_desc_MintAuthority:
    .word 3
    .byte 12
    .ascii "token_symbol"
    .align 3
    .word 9
    .byte 10
    .ascii "max_supply"
    .align 3
    .word 4
    .byte 6
    .ascii "minted"
